titleStmt.title: SII 6.45: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 45. (A.R. No. 93-A of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Beginning is lost.ku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturddaśiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa viśākattu nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu karuvilināṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻanallūril Āyirapokaprasādam peṟṟuṭaiya centamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Inakkunallaperumāḷāṉa coḻiyataraiyaṉeṉ nilavilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu cuttavalivaḷanāṭṭu taṉiyūr Irājādhi- rājaccaturvedimaṅkala
yil Uṭaiyār tiruaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśva- ratelakaṉmikaḷukku nāṉ viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puraṅkarampaināṭṭu brahmadeśam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻacaturvvedimaṅkalattu piṭākai kulottuṅkacoḻaviḷākattu kuntadevi
ṇṇāṟṟu catirattu nilam m 6- m catirattuk kiḻkkaṭaiya nilam � Itil nilam 2�- m- 3- kku 3- catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam � Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam la nilam � 6- catirattu nilam 7� kku 2- catirattu mekkaṭaiya nilam-m 5� Itil teṟkaṭaiya nilam ma nikki Itiṉ vaṭakkaṭaiya m 3- catirattu nilam 8�- m 4- catirattu nilam 5- catirattu nilam 8�- m 6- catirattu nilam 8� Itil payakka
� 5-9 1- catirattu kiḻkkaṭaiya nilam 4� Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam-m 3�- m meṟkaṭaiya nilam 4� Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 2�- m 2- catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 6� Itil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam 6� I-m 3- catirattu nilam 8�- m 4- catirattu nilam 8�- m 5- catirattu nilam 6- [catirattu nilam-m] 8� Itil vayakkāṭṭu vayattāl nilam ma nikki nilam 7�tma- m 6-9 1- catirattu nilam 8�- m 2- catirattu nilam 8�- m
rattu nilam 6- catirattu m ceyya ya kku meṟkku Irācarācavākkālukku vaṭakku 2-9 4- catirattu nilam pama- m 2- catirattu nilam 4�- m 3- catirattu nilam �ma- m 4- catirattu nilam 3pama 5- catirattu nilam �m 3- ṅ9 1- catirattu Āṟṟukkuk kiḻakku nilam 3- ṅ9 6- catirattu Āṟṟu varampu kai vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 6- I-m 5- kka 1- catira nilam �manta- m 6-9 1- catirattu Āṟṟukku
nta Innilam nūṟṟu Aimpattu Aiñcumāk kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Ittiruaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevarkaṉmikaḷukku Inakkunallaperumāḷāṉa coḻiyavaraiyaṉeṉ Innilam nūṟṟu Aimpattu Aiñcumāk kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmilicaiñca vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkkācu 3 10000 5 1000 Ikkācu mup
peṟṟa kaiccelavaṟa kaiykoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai[ pramāṇa] Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutta Innilaṅkaḷil meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Erperppaṭṭa maikaḷum bhāgāya bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Innila nilam viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Innilattukku Ituve vilai Ōlaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷccilavo
cilavolai kāṭṭakaṭavatallavākavum Innilattukku Ivar veṇṭiṉapote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkakaṭaveṉākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu nilavilaikkupoṉ Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmikaḷukku centamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Inakkunallaperumāḷāṉa coḻiyavaraiya
pattaiyyāyirattukkum viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ centamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ Eṉakkunallaperumāḷāṉa coḻiyavarayaṉeṉ Eṉ ṉeḻuttu .. Ivar colla Innilavilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ kulottuṅkacoḻacaturvedimaṅkalattu vaṅkippuṟattu tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ(p) paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ surasārampit tevacci
raicūriyatevapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ kovintapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kāyākkuṭi caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉeṉ ..ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koṉSome of the inscribed stones seem to have been lost in rebuilding.
Digital edition of SII 6.45 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
